item.name: Questionnaire Stroke Risk Predict (EHR)
item.description:
EHR questionnaire-based stroke prediction using LightGBM model.
No PPG signal required. Uses EHR_AI_SERVICE_URL.
Returns same prediction format as /patient/predict with prediction_type: AI_QUESTIONNAIRE.

item.name: QR Scan
item.description:
Scan a doctor QR code. Format: DOCTOR_{doctor_profile_id}.
Response includes: doctor profile, connection_status (connected/pending/none).
If connection_status is 'none' → Flutter shows Send Request button.

item.name: Mark Notification Read (Flutter alias)
item.description: Flutter compatibility alias. Same as PATCH /patient/notifications/{id}

item.name: POST Mark All Chats as Read
